channel.title: On the Boards
channel.description: Upcoming events for On the Boards

item.title: Amy O'Neal
item.description:
Thursday, March 26, 2026 at 8 PM

Again, There Is No Other (The Remix)March 26-28, 2026 | Commission, World PremiereA ritual of femme power and connection rooted in two decades of research and participation in street and contemporary dance cultures.TicketsSubscribe

Event details

item.title: Fauxnique
item.description:
Thursday, May 7, 2026 at 8 PM

How Do I Look?May 7-9, 2026Fauxnique wields a provocative, wry framework of drag, dance, and philosophy to confront identity, femininity, and self-image.TicketsSubscribe

Event details

item.title: NW New Works 2026
item.description:
Thursday, June 4, 2026 at 8 PM

June 4-6, 2026Since 1983, NW New Works has been a vibrant celebration of artists from all performance disciplines, showcasing the dynamic arts community of the Pacific Northwest.TicketsSubscribe

Event details
